title: Phatthaya Heat Wave
lead: Phatthaya is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.77. This critical event has reached a score of 10.0/10, requiring immediate attention.
body:
The current heat wave in Phatthaya is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, and the wind speed is 13.6 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG indicates that the city is not experiencing any cold temperatures, further exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols to ensure public safety
